global.description: The ad features a prominent logo, a central graphic, and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with a reward offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a rounded font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: A large graphic element in the center, consisting of a circle and a rectangle, both outlined in a light color against a blue background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller graphic element in the center, resembling a rectangle, also outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text reading 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind' in a large font, centrally positioned within the ad.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Claim reward' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: Logo text
elements.description: The text 'EarnPath' displayed in a smaller font above the main graphic element.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, simple and modern, EarnPath logo, secure service.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main graphic is centered, the headline is below the graphic, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Secure & simple Built for peace of mind, Claim reward
